_comment: Two-pool neural-art profile for run-23 — SPLIT weights and activations so they stop overlapping. Weights -> cpuRAM1 (AXISRAM1 @0x34064000, ACC_READ); activations -> npuRAM3 (AXISRAM3 @0x34200000, ACC_WRITE, NPURAM). Fixes the single-pool bug where Conv2D_6_weights (offset 0) shared its pool with activations (Reshape_4_out ...) and got overwritten during inference -> NPU garbage. Same optimization options as the shipped sram profile, plus the explicit --weights-pool/--activations-pool selectors.
